# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
- name: service1
  url: http://service1.com
  routes:
  - name: route1
    paths:
    - /api/service1
consumers:
- username: consumer1
  custom_id: user1
routes:
- protocols:
  - https
  strip_path: false
  preserve_host: true
  name: service1-route
  hosts:
  - service1.com
  paths:
  - /api/service1
  sources:
  - ip: 0.0.0.0/0
  destinations:
  - service: service1
    port: 8080
plugins:
- name: rate-limiting
  config:
    minute: 5000
